15 x AA batteries (5 x escutcheons)

Worked through offlines on building W, C, G, J and H.
Recommend Node to be installed for C toilets, and a Node or Gateway for building J toilets, as these are all too far currently.

see below various notes of works:

Installed new node outside room w135 to connect plant room, also added cleaners cupboard, 116 & 117
Resolved connection issues with 220 & 217
Replaced batteries in geo locks 101A x 2 and 101B
Replaced batteries in a few doors around W building and updated a few doors that needed updates
W117 swapped escutcheon with customer spare
Ran a new node to improve connections outside room w101 from ms08 gw
Principles office and boardroom are now connected
Relocated ms06 gateway to staff room next to reception, ran a new node from that toward the fish bowl. Added all doors from that area to the new node.
Working on connection issues in C building.
Male and disabled toilets are too far from a gw/node, closest gateway is in y12 common room
Changed batteries in room c18 & c19 & c12
G101 has no chip and is not connected to gateway
G229 needed update and handle needed some fixes
G236 wasn’t connected to a node
While looking for g240(new IT) we found a couple doors in IT are not in the g building system
Can’t find door G240
Serviced all handles on 2nd floor in W building looking for a non responsive handle Andrea discovered. Many locks and handles needed screws tightened
W214 replaced handle with spare
Building H and J - brought online the doors that had dropped off. Building J toilets are too far from a node, and may need a gateway or node fitted.
